title: HEA Returns Capital Credits to Members
summary: Homer, Alaska – Homer Electric Association, Inc. (HEA), a member-owned not-for-profit electric cooperative, is distributing $3,580,000 in capital credits to approximately 8,800 members and former members. Members with an active HEA account will receive a credit on their May energy bill statement. Th...

title: A Cooler for the Summer
summary: This cooler is good for boat and road trips, plus it's bear-resistant and the sort of product that should last a lifetime. The post A Cooler for the Summer appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Members Elect Board of Directors at 2022 Annual Meeting
summary: Homer Electric Association (HEA) members elected three directors at the cooperative’s 72nd Annual Meeting of the Members in Kenai on May 4, 2022.
